rationale: Gov't Code §2001.141 governs form and findings requirements for state agency contested-case decisions. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A decision or order of a state agency that may become final under Section 2001.144 that is adverse to any party in a contested case must be in writing and signed by a person authorized by the agency to sign the agency decision or order.
